plugin.description: Left-clicks the ground item under your cursor when it matches your whitelist, categories, or rarity filter. Never moves the cursor.
settings.require_hold_key: Require holding key to pick up
settings.require_hold_key.tooltip:
When on, items are only clicked while the pickup key is held.
When off, matching items are auto-clicked whenever your cursor is over them.
settings.add_key: Add hovered item to whitelist key
settings.block_panel: Block pickup while a large panel is open
settings.max_distance.tooltip:
Items farther than this grid distance from your character are ignored.
0 = no limit.
settings.delay.tooltip: A random delay in this range is waited between detecting a matching item and clicking it.
settings.categories.hint: Hover an item in-game to auto-discover its category here.
settings.whitelist.count: {0} item(s). Hover an item in-game and press the add key.
